title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DRDO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
